content: agent2: implementing cache-statistics API (dspy.cache.stats()/reset_stats(), Prediction.get_cache_usage()). Plan to touch dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/primitives/prediction.py, dspy/primitives/program.py, dspy/utils/usage_tracker.py. Will coordinate if overlapping.

agent2: I've added to dspy/clients/cache.py: import Counter from collections, import 'from dspy.dsp.utils.settings import settings'. In Cache.__init__ added 'self._stats = Counter(hits=0, mem_hits=0, disk_hits=0, misses=0)' right after self._lock = threading.RLock(). In get(): added self._record_cache_event('mem_hits'/'disk_hits'/'misses') calls in each branch (mem hit / disk hit / miss-else), keeping existing logic untouched otherwise. Added two new methods after get(): _record_cache_event(), stats(), reset_stats(). Did NOT touch put() or cache_key(). Also touched dspy/utils/usage_tracker.py (added cache_usage Counter + add_cache_event/get_cache_usage), dspy/primitives/prediction.py (get_cache_usage/set_cache_usage), dspy/primitives/program.py (wires cache usage into Module.__call__/acall). Should merge cleanly with your TTL work as long as your get()/put() edits keep the hit/miss branch structure intact for me to hook _record_cache_event into. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.
